name: Ben & Jerry's Orange Cream Dream
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup orange juice (from frozen concentrate, thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the eggs in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy, about 1 to 2 minutes.
2. Gradually whisk in the sugar, continuing to whisk until completely blended.
3. Pour in the cream and milk, then add the orange juice concentrate and vanilla extract. Blend thoroughly.
4. Transfer the mixture to an ice cream freezer and freeze following the manufacturer's instructions.
5. Makes 1 quart.
